browser_proof_command: Done means: the live homepage shows `Get started free` on both `/start` CTAs, the production smoke lane passes that locked assertion, and the heartbeat lane no longer dies on the old checkout fetch path.
anti_regression_checks: Live homepage CTA copy still says `Get started free` in both visible `/start` CTA slots.
Pipeline cron heartbeat checks out `ref: main` with current GitHub action versions instead of the old exact-SHA fetch path.
next_command: Run the CTA/workflow reliability seam only.
